# Visual harness substrate + scope-floor-v1 goldens (delivered leaf of the baseline harness program)

## Context

Review convergence on PR #15007 (the #14618 visual-regression harness): the delivered head ships the harness SUBSTRATE and four deterministic goldens, but #14618's full scope floor also names a token-demo-surface golden and one AgentCard per STATE — and the committed seed roster only exercises `ok`/`idle`/`off`. Per the honest close-target discipline, this ticket is the narrow delivered-scope child; #14618 stays open for the remainder.

## Delivered scope (this ticket, closed by PR #15007)

- The named visual Playwright config: forced `reducedMotion`, project-level viewport that is mechanically effective (after the device spread — the review caught the dead top-level declaration silently mis-sizing every golden), `reuseExistingServer: false` (a design-authority suite renders only ITS OWN checkout), reviewed-refresh-only semantics (`--update-snapshots`).
- The rebuild-before-baseline invariant as a run-failing `globalSetup` (tree-wide SCSS-vs-built-CSS mtime; it convicted three genuinely stale trees on its first night).
- Four committed goldens at the effective 1600×900 viewport: default cockpit shell, fleet grid, activity chip row, and the Accounts surface (inheriting the golden orphaned by PR #14998's spec reshaping, per the design-gate disposition there).
- Determinism proven per refresh: a generation run followed by a clean pass against the committed goldens.

## Remainder (stays on #14618)

- One AgentCard golden per STATE in the full vocabulary (needs a harness-scoped fixture seam — the PRODUCT seed roster must stay honest, so state-variant fixtures cannot be smuggled into it).
- The token-demo-surface golden (its canonical page is the consumer leaf's own deliverable; capturing a placeholder would violate the design-regression-not-content-churn rule).
- The shell golden's first reviewed refresh now that the preset bar merged.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] PR #15007's delivered set (config + guard + four goldens + determinism evidence) merged with this ticket as its truthful close target.
- [ ] #14618 remains open carrying the remainder above.
